_doc: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for coding-agent model pins. Two tiers; each agent maps to a tier. To upgrade a generation, edit ONE tier value here, then run `python3 bench/model-pins/check.py --apply` to propagate to agent .md frontmatter. bench/lib/capture.py reads this file directly at runtime (no second copy). check.py also verifies bench/prices.json has a price row for each tier model. NOTE: Claude Code agent frontmatter `model:` accepts no runtime indirection (${VAR}/central-config unsupported) and the global CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL env var would flatten both tiers to one model — so frontmatter must stay literal and is kept in sync by check.py rather than referencing this file at runtime.
